name: rag-pipeline
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline: embeds a query via an embedding API, searches a vector store for relevant documents, and synthesizes an answer using an LLM. Requires API keys for the embedding service and the LLM provider stored in the secrets vault.

EMBEDDING_API_URL.description: Full URL for the embedding API endpoint (e.g. 'https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings'). The request POSTs JSON with {"model": EMBEDDING_MODEL, "input": query}.

EMBEDDING_MODEL.description: Model identifier sent to the embedding API (e.g. 'text-embedding-3-small', 'text-embedding-ada-002').

EMBEDDING_API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path for the embedding API key (e.g. 'rag/embedding_api_key'). Must match the path used in create_secret and install_module_from_catalog allowed_secrets.

VECTOR_DB_URL.description: Full URL for the vector store search endpoint (e.g. 'https://my-index.pinecone.io/query'). The request POSTs JSON with {"vector": [...], "topK": TOP_K, "includeMetadata": true}.

VECTOR_DB_API_KEY_SECRET.description: Optional vault path for the vector DB API key. When set, the key is injected as an 'Api-Key' header. Omit if the vector DB uses no authentication.

TOP_K.description: Number of nearest-neighbor results to retrieve from the vector store (1-50).

LLM_API_URL.description: Full URL for the LLM chat completions endpoint.

LLM_MODEL.description: LLM model identifier for answer synthesis (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o-mini').

LLM_API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path for the LLM API key (e.g. 'rag/llm_api_key').

SYSTEM_PROMPT.default: You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question using ONLY the provided context documents. If the context does not contain enough information, say so explicitly. Do not make up information.
SYSTEM_PROMPT.description: System prompt for the LLM synthesis step. The retrieved documents are appended as context automatically.

MAX_TOKENS.description: Maximum tokens for the LLM response.

SCORE_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum similarity score to include a document in the context (0.0-1.0). Documents below this threshold are filtered out.

output_shape.answer: The LLM-synthesized answer based on retrieved context
output_shape.query: The original query that was embedded and searched
output_shape.sources: Array of retrieved documents with text, score, and metadata
output_shape.source_count: Number of documents that passed the score threshold
output_shape.model: The LLM model used for synthesis

setup_instructions.title: Store embedding API key
setup_instructions.detail: create_secret {name: 'rag/embedding_api_key', value: 'sk-...', namespace: 'ai'}. If using OpenAI embeddings, this is your OpenAI API key.

setup_instructions.title: Store LLM API key
setup_instructions.detail: create_secret {name: 'rag/llm_api_key', value: 'sk-...', namespace: 'ai'}. Can be the same key as the embedding key if both use the same provider.

setup_instructions.title: Install the module with secret access
setup_instructions.detail: install_module_from_catalog {name: 'rag-pipeline', allowed_secrets: ['rag/embedding_api_key', 'rag/llm_api_key']}. Add 'rag/vector_db_api_key' if your vector DB requires authentication.

setup_instructions.title: Configure node with your endpoints
setup_instructions.detail: Set EMBEDDING_API_URL to your embedding endpoint, VECTOR_DB_URL to your vector store query endpoint, and both _API_KEY_SECRET configs to the matching vault paths. Input to this node should be a JSON object with a 'query' field containing the user's question.
